subject: docs(theme): add DaisyUI migration guide to THEME_DARK_MODE.md
body:
6-phase migration guide for repos transitioning from custom CSS
variables to DaisyUI dual-layer theming. Covers audit search patterns,
variable-to-semantic mapping tables, component class migration priority,
z-index normalization, verification checklist, and a reusable AI audit
prompt template derived from graphiki's DaisyUI compliance audit.

Tags: documentation, patterns, theme, migration, daisyui
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_016uMc5mZcqau5orf2HUr4aL
